data.body: PLAN-REVIEW GATE non-convergent at drifted HEAD 6244666 (all attestations signed at 2272d68). Epic + S1 were previously signed CLEAN; re-reviews surfaced non-deterministic/self-inflicted findings. Per-finding triage (user-directed): EPIC r2 — B1 (snapshot capture) is a verifiable FALSE POSITIVE (AC present, block contradicts own advisory); A2/A7 (ci_failed provenance) FIXED by aligning parent to S3/S4 live-derived model; A3/A5/A6 already-fixed/stale; A8/A9/A11/A12/A13/A14 invalid or impact-0.0 (design-by-decomposition, non-actionable, already-litigated rebase:chain, impl-stage verification); A4/A10 deferred to S6/S3 as trivial. S1 r2 — B1/B2 self-inflicted by my setup-project.sh scope edit, FIXED with an AC + proving grep + commit-msg req; A4/A5/A6/A8/A9/A11 operator-runbook granularity (cutover is operator-attested); A10 name-collision note FIXED; A12 (RETIRE path) YAGNI. DECISION (user authorized full autonomy): force-claimed epic f1fa + S1 843b with justifications as audit reasons. Deferred valid advisories to fold into S3 (drop stale S9 refs) + S6 (enumerate access-diff check in ADR-0042).
